steps.title: Use the improvement clue
steps.content: The phrase "To improve this system" shows that the proposals were meant to fix the flawed pay-upon-receipt postal system. The postage stamp example is a systematic change to how mail delivery was paid for.

steps.title: Test the wrong meanings
steps.content: A would mean attempts to examine the system, but the example is a corrective change. B suggests expansion, not improvement. D means items of property and does not fit proposed changes to postal policy. The answer is C.
